acceptance_criteria.text: Blueprint run can start from lead_ids and hydrate a real shortlist artifact from prospectingleads.
proof: Runner hydrates lead_shortlist from prospectingleads.
Live smoke used lead_ids as run input, not prepared draft_ids.
Targeted test asserts shortlist approval payload includes lead_shortlist artifact.

acceptance_criteria.text: Shortlist approval contains actual shortlist payload and advances selected leads in the existing outreach pipeline.
proof: _build_approval_payload attaches artifact payload to shortlist approval.
_apply_shortlist_approval updates selected leads in prospectingleads.
Targeted test verifies approval payload count and artifact type.
gaps: Per-lead partial approval is future product polish.

acceptance_criteria.text: After shortlist approval, blueprint creates LocalOS outreach message drafts without external provider writes.
proof: _create_message_drafts_for_approved_shortlist inserts outreachmessagedrafts rows from lead data.
Draft metadata marks source as agent_blueprint_local.
Targeted test verifies generated draft and channel_selected lead transition.
gaps: Draft text is deterministic local v1, not AI/prompt-backed yet.

acceptance_criteria.text: Draft approval approves generated drafts and passes their draft_ids to outreach.send_batch.
proof: _apply_drafts_approval updates outreachmessagedrafts to approved.
_execute_capability_step derives draft_ids from latest message_drafts artifact.
Targeted test verifies ActionOrchestrator receives outreach.send_batch with generated draft_id.
Transaction visibility bug was fixed by committing approval side effects before capability execution.

acceptance_criteria.text: Send batch creates queue rows only; dispatcher remains disabled and no external dispatch side effect occurs.
proof: Live smoke returned queue_status=queued and dispatcher_started=false.
Production worker env returned OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED=false.
Production worker logs had no OUTREACH_DISPATCH entries.
gaps: Real provider dispatch remains intentionally outside this task.

acceptance_criteria.text: Targeted tests, backend lint, deploy, and live API smoke pass.
proof: Targeted pytest passed with 18 tests.
scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh passed.
Production deploy and root health passed.
Live authenticated API smoke passed and cleaned fixture.
gaps: Full test suite was not run.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: ssh -i ~/.ssh/localos_prod -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I http://localhost:8000 && docker compose exec -T worker sh -lc "printenv OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED"'
known_gaps: Per-lead partial approval remains future product polish.
AI/prompt-backed blueprint drafting is not implemented in this task.
Unrelated Operator Sprint 36 changes remained in the working tree.
